Google announced Monday that it’s making its Gemini in Chrome feature available in multiple countries in APAC new markets, including Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. Gemini in Chrome was available to U.S.-based users through the January launch, and the company expanded the availability to India, Canada, and New Zealand in March. With this launch, Gemini in Chrome is available in more countries.
